turns.say: Is parking free at your hotel? And is there somewhere safe to charge my e-bike overnight?
turns.transcript: Is parking free at your hotel? And is there somewhere safe to charge my e-bike overnight?
turns.reply:
Parking is free for all guests in our private lot right by the hotel.
Your e-bike can charge overnight in our secure bike storage — it’s safe and included.

parking_bikes.car: Private parking lot, free of charge for all hotel guests, just steps from the rooms.
parking_bikes.bicycle: Secure bike storage with charging power included ('Your bike sleeps safely — with power included').
